purpose: TeoyubeSearch is the spiritual search engine of the platform. It guides the Saint from Search -> Promise -> Meaning -> Prayer -> Teoyube Word -> Assignment -> Book of the Saint.
placeholder: Search your situation, promise, scripture, prayer, calling, or Teoyube word...

example.query: I feel confused about my purpose.
example.daily_divine_assignment: Write down three gifts, three burdens, and one step you can take today toward your calling.
